title: 16pc Ratchet Screwdriver Grip Handle Set with Magnetized Bits Power Hand Tools
description:
This 16pc micro screwdriver set comes with a special T-handle grip for easier use. Instead of straining you hand on a tight screw, this hand grip allows you to use more force with less stress on your hand. The set will come in very useful around the house and garage. This great set has just about every bit and driver you could want. With multiple bits to choose from, this screwdriver set is great for any hobby, task, and more! SPECIFICATIONS: - T-Handle Ergonomic Grip - 15-Piece CRV Bits - 1-Piece Interchangeable Ratchet Handle - Bit Size: 1/4-Inch x 1-Inch - Handle Length: 6.5 Inch - Color: Yellow PACKAGE INCLUDES: (15) Bits (1) Ratchet Handle

16pc Ratchet Screwdriver Grip Handle Set with Magnetized Bits Power Hand Tools

This 16pc micro screwdriver set comes with a special T-handle grip for easier use. Instead of straining you hand on a tight screw, this hand grip allows you to use more force with less stress on your hand. The set will come in very useful around the house and garage.

This great set has just about every bit and driver you could want. With multiple bits to choose from, this screwdriver set is great for any hobby, task, and more!

Key Features

  • Ratchet Screwdriver Set with Magnetized Bits
  • T-Handle Ergonomic Grip
  • 15-Piece CRV Bits
  • 1-Piece Interchangeable Ratchet Handle
  • Bit Size: 1/4-Inch x 1-Inch

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 11PSMB56-757
  • UPC: 127394734509
  • Color: Yellow
  • Size: 6.5 in x 0.5 in x 0.5 in

- T-Handle Ergonomic Grip - 15-Piece CRV Bits - 1-Piece Interchangeable Ratchet Handle - Bit Size: 1/4-Inch x 1-Inch - Handle Length: 6.5 Inch - Color: Yellow
